---
title: "Competing risks and the causal interpretation of targeted prophylaxis in CRE-colonised liver transplant recipients"
subtitle: "Letter to the Editor — *Clinical Infectious Diseases*"
date: "April 2, 2026"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    number-sections: false
  docx:
    reference-doc: null
    number-sections: false
execute:
  echo: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

::: callout-note
This report
:::
